task.title: Selecting the Default Paper Source Settings
task.shortdesc: You can change default paper source settings using the control panel on the product.

context.p: You can change default paper source settings using the control panel on the product.

step.cmd: Press the home button, if necessary.
Select Auto Error Solverand select one of these options:

ul.li: Turn on this setting to display a warning and print single-sided when a 2-sided printing error occurs, or to print only what the printer could process when a memory full error occurs.
Turn off this setting to display an error message and stop printing if an error occurs.

step.cmd: Select the Paper Source Settingsoptions you want to use.
When you are finished, press the home button to exit.
